title: On simple groups definable in some valued fields
author_string: Jakub Gismatullin, Immanuel Halupczok, Dugald Macpherson
abstract: We prove that non-abelian definable, definably simple groups in 1-h-minimal henselian valued fields are essentially already linear algebraic groups. Here, the group is assumed to live in the home sort. We have a similar result in pure algebraically closed valued fields of positive characteristic, under the additional assumption that the definable group is a subgroup of a linear algebraic group.
